text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 13:59 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

IMPLEMENTED AND VALIDATED FOR THE FIRST-SLICE FAILOVER PROOF. After a successful whole-object PUT, coordinator A is stopped. B and C retain the two-voter control quorum. A client uses node B's existing S3 endpoint; B resolves the committed object-reference generation and returns bytes from a referenced checksum-valid replica. This proves only the narrow one-node-stop slice, not dynamic membership, healing, rebalance, broader partitions, upgrades, or production readiness.
Runtime: Exact-Byte GET After Coordinator A Stops
using AWS CLI, SDK, curl, or
